svg.title: Scout modular architecture diagram
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing Scout's developmental transformer architecture: shared token embedding at the bottom, passing through a router to stacked transformer modules (TinyStories, conversational, reflective, inner voice), then through a shared output head to logits. Each module is frozen before the next is added.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are input tokens embedded in Scout?')
sendPrompt('What does the shared language core do in Scout?')
g.text: token embedding · output head · weight tying

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the attention router work in Scout?')
sendPrompt('What does the TinyStories module learn?')
g.text: 12 layers · dim 512 · coherent language · basic narrative

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What will the conversational module train on?')
g.text: synthetic corpus · TinyStories + WildChat · Scout voice

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What corpus will train the reflective module?')
sendPrompt('How will the inner voice module be trained?')
sendPrompt('How does the shared output head work?')
